components.title: AD GPO Client hardening
components.description:
There is a Active Directory Group Policy called "Client Hardening" which on Windows desktops sets multiple settings.
- Screen lock is set to activate after a 15 minutes of user inactivity

control-implementations.description: Control implementations for AD GPO Client hardening.

implemented-requirements.description: The GPO sets the session logoff after 10 hours of user inactivity on all Windows desktop computers.
The GPO sets the windows screen lock to activate after 10 minutes of user inactivity on all Windows desktop computers.
